nasb.text: How precious is Your lovingkindness, O God! And the children of men take refuge in the shadow of Your wings.

esv.text: How precious is your steadfast love, O God! The children of mankind take refuge in the shadow of your wings.

cnv.text: 神啊！你的慈愛多麼寶貴； 世人都投靠在你的翅膀蔭下。

ccb.text: 上帝啊， 你的慈爱无比宝贵！ 世人都在你的翅膀下寻求荫庇。

csbs.text: 神哪，你的慈爱多么宝贵， 世人投靠在你翅膀的荫庇下！
